summary.intent: Upgrade the actions/upload-artifact GitHub Actions step from v4 to v7 in both CI and nightly workflow files.
summary.outcome: Successfully bumped actions/upload-artifact from v4 to v7 in ci.yml and nightly.yml.

repo: The repo uses actions/upload-artifact in at least two workflow files: .github/workflows/ci.yml (coverage diagnostics) and .github/workflows/nightly.yml (mutation reports).

code.finding: upload-artifact step is under the coverage diagnostics job, triggered on failure.
upload-artifact step is under the mutation report job, triggered always (if: always()).

workflow: GitHub Actions artifact version bumps should be applied consistently across all workflow files in a repo.

open_items: Check if actions/upload-artifact@v4 is used in any other workflow files in the repo that were not included in this patch.
